title: Origins: Umbra
description: An origin that's able to appear at its ball.
body:
# ✨ Umbra **(Impact 3 Origin)** *Shrouded in mystery, these strange wanderers slip through space to catch their enemy off guard.* ## • Powerlist •
☄️ Vein of Aurora: Primary Ability You may command a Cluster of cosmic energy, shooting it as a manifestation that resembles a ball.
Info This Cluster will detonate after 6 seconds, pushing back nearby entities.
🌌 Starlight Warp: Secondary Ability Channel a beacon of starlight, calling your body to your Cluster. This teleports you to it, detonating it and dealing damage to all nearby entities.
Info Teleport while sneaking to contain your cluster's explosion.
👊 Dazzling Punch Punching your Cluster will increase its velocity, sending it through blocks at a faster speed.
❔ Mystique You fall slower, move faster in the air, and can even step on a cloud of stardust as a second jump. Your jump recharges after a few seconds, or if you touch the ground.
⏳﻿ Inevitable Strike Teleporting to your Cluster and using Mystique will each increase your strength as you use them, until you land an Inevitable Strike, touch the ground, or are Flared. Use this thunderous slash by critical hitting an opponent, launching you upward and immediately replenishing your Mystique jumps if they were on cooldown.
Info This allows you to deal intense damage after a period of dancing around your opponent
💸 Familiar Shroud While you cannot use Elytra to glide, they provide an additional jump while worn.
﻿👑﻿ Wilting Fury Taking damage whilst in the air will cause you to Flare, disabling Mystique until you land.
🔷 Null You are immune to Thorns and suffocation.
🩰 Twinkling Footsteps You cannot sprint on the ground, you gain increased aerial velocity while airborne.
﻿🌻﻿ Reanimation Your body exhausts less and heals only while stable. All natural regeneration is paused while airborne.
💔 Instability Your innate energy field causes some beneficial status effects to fade a lot earlier. Instant Health, Regeneration, and Strength burn away at twice the speed.
## • Additional • My development on this origin was assisted by TheViralMelon and Stal, so thanks to them for allowing me to create this!
